name: @chart-review/mcp-server-ner-anthropic
description: Anthropic Agent SDK adapter for chart_review_ner. Wraps the 7 NER handlers from mcp-core-ner with tool() + createSdkMcpServer for in-process registration, and exposes buildNerMcpServersConfig (the transport selector that picks in-process vs stdio subprocess based on provider).
